docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, DENISE DBA  DOGS LIFE PRODUCTIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILM HERO-GROUPEEZ $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG . PLAINTIFF DENISE RICHARDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY RICHARDS, DENISE DBA  DOGS LIFE PRODUCTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT FILM HERO-GROUPEEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED MAR-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FILM HERO-GROUPEEZ
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY RICHARDS, DENISE DBA  DOGS LIFE PRODUCTIONS
